top_stories.title: How does the Iran crisis compare with the 1979 oil shock?
top_stories.summary: LONDON — The Iran war has created the largest oil supply shock ever in terms of daily production losses but the 1979 Iranian Revolution remains the biggest oil crisis by cumulative supply loss, according to Reuters calculations based on International Energy Agency, OPEC and US Department of Energy data. The scale of...

top_stories.title: T-bill, bond rates may be mixed on PHL inflation, Fed hike bets
top_stories.summary: YIELDS on the Treasury bills (T-bills) and Treasury bonds (T-bonds) up for auction this week may end mixed amid inflation and rate hike bets. top_stories.title: June inflation likely eased for second month in a row — poll
top_stories.summary: PHILIPPINE INFLATION likely eased for a second straight month to a three-month low in June as lower oil and rice prices offset higher electricity rates, analysts said.
